items.name_en: !!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
items.name_cn:
!!️Full Original Retail Packaging!!️【New】Arcadie Matelasse Sheepskin Medium Tote/Shoulder Bag~Black Leather
This handbag uses Matelasse craftsmanship, with a three-dimensional texture and exquisite feel bringing a new interpretation to the classic silhouette. The front letter logo cleverly echoes the metal hardware, exquisite workmanship is outstanding, showing a distinctive classic style. Dynamic and elegant lines paired with a detachable adjustable shoulder strap present a practical and versatile design with modern charm.
~Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
~Zip closure
~Lined with 2 slip pockets
~With foot studs
Model: 5BB124.
Size: W24×H17×D7.5cm
Color: Black Full Leather/Original Leather.
Italian Creation

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️GG Marmont Mini Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain strap mini shoulder bag features a structured soft shape and an oversized flap closure, with GG metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap has multiple carrying methods, allowing for free switching between shoulder and hand carry. It features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Wavy quilted leather with a GG logo, retro gold-tone metal hardware with double G, sliding chain strap adjustable to a shoulder strap height of 55cm, or a top handle height of 30cm. Can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️Gucci Horsebit Chain series small shoulder bag. Gucci reinterprets brand classic elements, cleverly blending heritage design with fashion creativity to showcase contemporary aesthetic concepts. This handbag is exquisitely embellished with the bit chain design that was popular in the early 2000s, inheriting the brand's classic style. The 2023 Fall/Winter series reinterprets this model, using various colors and textures to highlight a modern style. Light blue quilted leather, palladium hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, bit chain, interior: one card slot and one pocket, detachable leather strap (23cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (19cm high), magnetic snap closure.

items.name_en: !N40471 White Check Silk-Print Nautical Collection Shopping Bag Series NEVERFULL This Neverfull Medium Handbag is crafted from Damier Azur coated canvas, featuring a dazzling nautical print woven from rope and chain motifs, infusing new life into the classic checkerboard pattern. Tighten or loosen the side straps to switch between a sharp and a relaxed style. Dimensions: 31 x 28 x 14 cm D

items.name_en: .!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. Crafted from premium leather, this new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag showcases the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small bag made of the brand's classic red Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.

.🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 series handbags, interpreting the double-ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots, under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno for the Qixi Valentine's Day campaign. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a delicate look and a soft, refined touch.
Exclusive for Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Side details: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 open pockets, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 25.9cm (L) x 17.5cm (W) x 9.9cm (D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: .🌷【New】GG Kids Animal Print Tote. The 2024 Early Spring Kids collection artfully blends circular interlocking GG and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. White and beige Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas trim, Gucci animal print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
